basic_details.job_title: Foreigners Tribunal Chirang Chowkidar Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Foreigners Tribunal Chirang Chowkidar Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the FT Chirang Chowkidar Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: As per existing Government policy with allowed relaxation in upper age limit for OBC/SC/ST.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Chowkidar. This is a contractual position offered by the Foreigners Tribunal Chirang.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Chowkidar post in the Foreigners Tribunal Chirang recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Chowkidar post is passing the 8th Standard.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Chowkidar post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 9000 per month for the Chowkidar position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Chowkidar post is scheduled for 22nd May 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Foreigners Tribunal Chirang located?
faq.answer: The Foreigners Tribunal Chirang is located in Kajalgaon, Assam, with the pincode 783385.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant documents as specified in the notification.
